expectations.text: AI pushes back on the monolith instead of speccing all 6 features
expectations.evidence: First AI response: 'You're describing six products, not one feature. That's exactly how teams end up with a vague spec and a stalled build.' — refused to spec anything, immediately challenged scope.

expectations.text: AI asks which feature to tackle first
expectations.evidence: AI drove the conversation toward identifying access management as the real first problem, then explicitly confirmed scope narrowing before proceeding.

expectations.text: Generated prompt uses XML structural tags
Generated prompt assigns a concrete downstream agent persona
expectations.evidence: final_prompt.md opens with: 'You are a senior software architect writing a detailed technical specification.'

expectations.text: Generated prompt includes testable success criteria section
expectations.evidence: final_prompt.md has a <success_criteria> block with per-component, objectively verifiable conditions (e.g., 'given valid credentials for an active user, the system creates a valid authenticated session').
